documents.text: BM25 is a classical sparse retrieval algorithm that ranks documents by term frequency and inverse document frequency.
Dense passage retrieval uses neural text embeddings to represent queries and documents in a shared vector space for semantic search.
BEIR is a heterogeneous benchmark for evaluating zero-shot information retrieval across diverse domains.
Dense retrieval methods trained with contrastive learning outperform sparse methods on many semantic similarity tasks.
The MTEB benchmark evaluates text embedding models across classification, clustering, retrieval, and semantic textual similarity tasks.
